typography_audit.delta_vs_8_scene: +1 (17 -> 18) - one new finding from Scene 5: #p5-headline 50px < 56px phase-headline min

details.notes: NEW Scene 5 introduces 1 new typography violation. Killer-row body sizes are fine: .killer-name 50px >= 48px PASS, .killer-conseq 30px >= 30px PASS (exact minimum).

details.summary: 13 additional pre-existing violations: code-text, code-lang, code-tag, pill-label, quote-handle, brand-tag, footer chrome - all 22-28px where 30px+ is required. Same set as 8-scene review.

elements.outcome_receipt: PARTIAL (#p9-outcome '4 STAGES * 3 SURFACES * 1 FOUNDER' is 32px, outcome-receipt min is 36px)
elements.cta_question: PASS (#cta-question 'Running this playbook, or still validating with vibes?' visible 36px+)

screenshot_anchor_marker_check.notes: No chart screenshots used; all marker-sweeps are on synthetic typography (em pills, headlines). PASS.

shape_backdrop_rearrange_check.verdict: PASS (T2..T9, repositionShapesPerPhase called with all 8 transitions)

high.title: Typography below role minimum (17 pre-existing selectors)
high.recommended_fix: V3 template-wide issue inherited from templates/shorts/anthropic/. Bump cp-title 36->48, cp-sub 24->30, surface-name 34->48, surface-job 22->30, etc. Fix at template root recommended.

high.title: #p5-headline 50px below 56px phase-headline minimum (NEW in Scene 5)
high.recommended_fix: Bump #p5-headline font-size from 50px to 56px (line 373 in index.html). Confirm overflow stays clean.

high.title: #p9-outcome 32px below 36px outcome-receipt minimum (last frame)
high.recommended_fix: Bump #p9-outcome from 32px to 40px so the last frame fully satisfies thumbnail-frame outcome-line minimum.
